assertions.expectation: First step: check the operation status to understand why it failed (gcloud container operations list)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'gcloud container operations list --filter="name:upgrade"' command to check upgrade status

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking events and logs for the specific failure reason
assertions.reason: Response asks for the error message at the end but doesn't provide specific commands to check events or logs for diagnosing the failure

assertions.expectation: Explains that the cluster is in a mixed-version state (8 nodes at 1.32, 12 at 1.31) which is within skew policy
assertions.reason: Response explains mixed-version state and notes 'GKE supports nodes up to 2 minor versions behind' the control plane

assertions.expectation: Notes that the mixed state is functional but not ideal — workloads can run on both versions
assertions.reason: Response states 'Your pods should be running fine on the mixed-version nodes' and notes the state is manageable

assertions.expectation: Provides options: retry the upgrade after fixing the root cause, or rollback the 8 upgraded nodes
assertions.reason: Response provides retry options but doesn't mention rollback as an option - only shows different approaches to complete the upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that retrying is usually better than rollback (rolling back means creating a new pool at old version)
assertions.reason: Response doesn't discuss rollback or explain why retrying is preferable to rollback

assertions.expectation: Addresses the remaining 2 node pools: they can still be upgraded once the failed pool issue is resolved
assertions.reason: Response states 'Keep them on the old version until the main pool is fully upgraded' and addresses the other node pools

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to diagnose the failure (operation details, node status, pod events)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get nodes -o wide', 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o wide', and 'gcloud container operations list' for diagnosis
